articles.title: Air India Cuts Fuel Surcharge On Long-Haul Flights To US, UK, Europe And Australia
articles.description: Air India has reduced fuel surcharges on long-haul flights to North America, Europe, the UK and Australia following a fall in crude oil prices.

articles.title: Oil prices start falling as Iran negotiations continue; gas prices are next: Expert
articles.description: Former White House economic adviser Steve Moore says Americans may soon see relief at the gas pump as lower oil prices work through the market.

articles.title: Oil prices start falling as Iran negotiations continue; gas prices are next: Expert
articles.description: Former White House economic adviser Steve Moore says Americans may soon see relief at the gas pump as lower oil prices work through the market.

articles.title: Jet Fuel Price Stabilization Scheme Fails, No Airlines Sign Up as Oil Prices Fall
articles.description: Jet fuel price stabilization program fails as no airlines sign up. Declining oil prices made the ₹10,000-crore scheme unattractive.

articles.title: Why petrol and diesel prices haven't fallen yet? Hardeep Singh Puri hints at rate cut after sustained low crude prices
articles.description: Fuel prices might see a dip if international crude oil rates stay low for a few more weeks, according to Union Minister Hardeep Puri. Oil companies are currently using crude purchased at higher prices during the West Asia conflict, leading to past losses. However, sustained low global prices could pave the way for a reduction at the pump. India also plans to boost its oil storage capacity.

articles.title: Don't expect petrol and diesel prices to fall just yet: Hardeep Puri
articles.description: Global crude oil prices have fallen to around $70 a barrel, but Petroleum Minister Hardeep Singh Puri says petrol and diesel prices are unlikely to be cut immediately because the fuel currently being sold was bought earlier at higher prices. He said any review of retail prices would depend on crude remaining at current levels for the next two to three months.

articles.title: Tesla Sales Rebound As It Cashes in on Sky-High Gas Prices
articles.description: A spike in gas prices due to the war in the Middle East appear to have given the EV industry a shot in the arm.

articles.title: Will Centre slash petrol, diesel prices? Here's what minister Hardeep Singh Puri said amid sliding crude oil
articles.description: Public sector oil marketing companies, including Bharat Petroleum Corporation Ltd (BPCL), Hindustan Petroleum Corporation Ltd (HPCL) and India Oil Corporation Ltd (IOCL), have raised petrol and diesel prices by a cumulative ₹7.5 per litre each through multiple revisions in the second half of May

articles.title: Oil firms lost nearly Rs 75,000 cr on fuel sales between Apr
articles.description: State-owned oil marketing companies' (OMCs) suffered a total loss of Rs 74,781 crore for selling petrol, diesel, and liquefied petroleum gas (LPG) below cost in the period April-June 2026.

articles.title: Nigeria's NNPC Revenue Drops in May Despite Higher Oil Output
articles.description: NNPC's May revenue fell to $3.15 billion even as Nigeria's crude output rose to 1.73 million bpd, as oil prices cooled from April's highs.
